meaning: adj.精神病的,精神错乱的,要发疯似的n.精神变态者
examples: The latter are in order as follows: Hypochondriasis, Depression, Hysteria and Psychopathic Deviate.
"He does have a very high level of some psychopathic traits," Maden said.
"The more psychopathic they are, the better they are about hiding it, " Brown said.
Two psychiatrists who assessed him for the trial both said he had a psychopathic personality disorder.
